prompt: Create a realistic DSLR-style candid photo from inside the front passenger seat of a car at a sunny drive-thru café. A smiling young woman with long chestnut brown hair, natural makeup, small hoop earrings, and realistic skin texture sits relaxed in the passenger seat, turned slightly toward the open window while looking warmly at the camera. She wears a pale sage-green short-sleeve ribbed button-up top, high-waisted cream wide-leg pants, a brown belt, a gold wristwatch, and a beige crossbody bag strap across her torso. Her right arm reaches out through the open car window to receive exactly 1 clear plastic cup of iced coffee with a domed lid from exactly 1 smiling female barista wearing a black shirt and green apron. The barista leans out of the drive-thru service window with both hands on the drink. Show the car interior clearly: black fabric passenger seat and headrest, dark door panel with beige trim, silver door handle, window controls, dashboard edge, windshield pillar, and side mirror. Outside the window, include the café drive-thru counter, menu boards with small unreadable text, potted greenery, a few blurred background customers, parked cars, and bright blue sky. Use soft natural daylight, warm summer atmosphere, realistic skin tones, shallow depth of field, subtle background blur, high identity preservation for the woman, no exaggerated posing, no text overlays, no watermark, no distorted hands, no extra drinks, and no extra main subjects.
